auto.name: Auto
auto.description: Lascia decidere a Gemini in base a brief, riferimenti e vincoli di leggibilità e fedeltà
auto.prompt_fragment: lit with coherent, scene-appropriate lighting chosen to match the brief and references while preserving accurate garment colors and readable fit lines

beauty_clamshell.name: Beauty clamshell
beauty_clamshell.description: Two-source top and bottom beauty setup (clamshell) for smooth skin, clean catchlights, minimal under-eye shadow; ideal for beauty and luxury fashion.
beauty_clamshell.prompt_fragment: illuminated with classic clamshell beauty lighting for smooth contours, clean catchlights, and minimal harsh shadows

beauty_dish.name: Beauty dish
beauty_dish.description: Centered beauty dish key with controlled falloff; crisp but flattering, strong cheekbone definition without harshness.
beauty_dish.prompt_fragment: lit with a centered beauty-dish key for crisp yet flattering facial definition and controlled shadow falloff

blue_hour_ambient.name: Blue hour ambient
blue_hour_ambient.description: Twilight blue ambient with soft contrast; calm, premium, slightly melancholic, great for winter narratives.
blue_hour_ambient.prompt_fragment: captured in blue-hour ambient light with cool tones, soft contrast, and calm premium mood

butterfly_lighting.name: Butterfly lighting
butterfly_lighting.description: Top-front key creates butterfly shadow under nose; classic beauty/fashion look with sculpted symmetry.
butterfly_lighting.prompt_fragment: lit with butterfly lighting to sculpt facial symmetry while keeping the look clean and editorial

cinema_rembrandt.name: Cinema rembrandt
cinema_rembrandt.description: 45-degree key creating a Rembrandt triangle; cinematic depth with elegant shadow structure, still readable for fashion.
cinema_rembrandt.prompt_fragment: lit with controlled Rembrandt key lighting for cinematic depth and sculpted shadows while preserving garment readability

cinema_rim_backlight.name: Cinema rim backlight
cinema_rim_backlight.description: Back/rim light to separate subject from background; premium contouring on hair and silhouette.
cinema_rim_backlight.prompt_fragment: shaped with a clean rim backlight to separate the subject and outline the silhouette with controlled highlights

cinema_split.name: Cinema split
cinema_split.description: Side key splits face into light/shadow; strong character, graphic mood, use with restraint for luxury.
cinema_split.prompt_fragment: illuminated with split lighting for a bold, graphic light-shadow divide and strong character

dramatic_spot_key.name: Dramatic spot key
dramatic_spot_key.description: Focused spot key with falloff; theatrical mood, isolates subject, best for awareness/editorial not fit proof.
dramatic_spot_key.prompt_fragment: lit with a focused spot key creating controlled falloff and a dramatic, isolated subject look

foggy_diffusion.name: Foggy diffusion
foggy_diffusion.description: Atmospheric diffusion (mist/fog) softens highlights and deepens depth; cinematic winter mood.
foggy_diffusion.prompt_fragment: lit through light atmospheric diffusion for softened highlights, gentle contrast, and cinematic depth

gobo_shadow_pattern.name: Gobo shadow pattern
gobo_shadow_pattern.description: Patterned shadows via gobo; cinematic texture on background while keeping garments readable.
gobo_shadow_pattern.prompt_fragment: lit with a subtle gobo pattern adding background texture while keeping the subject and garments clean and readable

golden_hour_backlit.name: Golden hour backlit
golden_hour_backlit.description: Low warm sun behind subject; luminous rim, gentle flare control, romantic but modern.
golden_hour_backlit.prompt_fragment: backlit by low golden-hour sun creating a soft luminous rim and gentle highlight rolloff

golden_hour_coastal.name: Golden hour coastal
golden_hour_coastal.description: Warm golden hour light typical of coastal settings
golden_hour_coastal.prompt_fragment: bathed in warm golden hour coastal sunlight with soft romantic tones

hard_sun_noon.name: Hard sun noon
hard_sun_noon.description: Direct high sun with crisp shadows and high contrast; editorial harsh daylight, exposes texture and structure.
hard_sun_noon.prompt_fragment: shot in hard noon sunlight with crisp, defined shadows that emphasize structure, texture, and form

high_contrast_chiaroscuro.name: High contrast chiaroscuro
high_contrast_chiaroscuro.description: Strong chiaroscuro with deep shadows and bright highlights; artful, cinematic, use when intent allows.
high_contrast_chiaroscuro.prompt_fragment: lit with controlled chiaroscuro lighting for strong depth, sculpted highlights, and dramatic shadow structure

industrial_fluorescent.name: Industrial fluorescent
industrial_fluorescent.description: Cool industrial fluorescents with slight green bias; utilitarian realism, warehouse/backstage vibe.
industrial_fluorescent.prompt_fragment: lit by industrial fluorescent practicals with cool tone and subtle green bias for utilitarian realism

mixed_daylight_tungsten.name: Mixed daylight and tungsten
mixed_daylight_tungsten.description: Deliberate cold daylight fill with warm tungsten practicals; classic ‘cool vs warm’ narrative contrast.
mixed_daylight_tungsten.prompt_fragment: lit with intentional mixed lighting: cool daylight fill against warm tungsten practical accents for a refined cold-warm contrast

mixed_practical.name: Mixed practical lights
mixed_practical.description: Combination of ambient and practical light sources
mixed_practical.prompt_fragment: lit by a mix of ambient and practical light sources for authentic atmosphere

moonlit_night.name: Moonlit night
moonlit_night.description: Cool moonlight feel with soft shadows; minimalist nocturne mood without looking like day-for-night.
moonlit_night.prompt_fragment: lit by a moonlit night ambience with cool tones and soft, believable shadow gradients

natural_window.name: Natural window light
natural_window.description: Soft directional light from large window
natural_window.prompt_fragment: illuminated by soft natural window light creating gentle directional shadows

neon_signs_night.name: Neon signs night
neon_signs_night.description: Urban neon motivated lighting; saturated edges, reflective highlights, modern street editorial.
neon_signs_night.prompt_fragment: lit by motivated neon signage and street practicals creating modern color contrast and reflective highlights

night_snow_warm.name: Night snow + warm interior
night_snow_warm.description: Cold exterior snow with warm interior glow contrast
night_snow_warm.prompt_fragment: lit by the contrast of cold blue snow light and warm interior glow

off_camera_flash_bounce.name: Off camera flash bounce
off_camera_flash_bounce.description: Bounced flash for soft, natural-looking indoor light; controlled shadows, realistic skin.
off_camera_flash_bounce.prompt_fragment: illuminated with bounced off-camera flash for soft, natural indoor light and controlled shadows

on_camera_flash_clean.name: On camera flash clean
on_camera_flash_clean.description: Direct on-camera flash: crisp, shadowed background, snapshot editorial energy; avoids blur and keeps texture.
on_camera_flash_clean.prompt_fragment: shot with clean on-camera flash for crisp texture, sharp details, and punchy editorial snapshot energy

overcast_city.name: Overcast city
overcast_city.description: Soft diffused light from overcast urban sky
overcast_city.prompt_fragment: photographed under soft overcast city light with even diffused illumination

overcast_softbox_sky.name: Overcast softbox sky
overcast_softbox_sky.description: Bright overcast acts like a giant softbox; ultra-even skin and fabric, great for fit proof outdoors.
overcast_softbox_sky.prompt_fragment: photographed under bright overcast light acting like a giant softbox for even exposure and clear fit lines

rain_wet_reflections.name: Rain wet reflections
rain_wet_reflections.description: Wet surfaces and practical reflections; night rain mood with controlled specular highlights.
rain_wet_reflections.prompt_fragment: lit by night practicals reflecting off wet surfaces, creating controlled specular highlights and cinematic rain atmosphere

ringlight_beauty.name: Ringlight beauty
ringlight_beauty.description: Ring light with circular catchlights; flat, modern beauty look, useful for e-commerce clarity if restrained.
ringlight_beauty.prompt_fragment: lit with a controlled ring-light beauty setup for even illumination, clean detail, and modern catchlights

snowfall_street_mixed.name: Snowfall street mixed
snowfall_street_mixed.description: Falling snow catching light from street practicals; cold ambience with warm accents; ideal for winter narrative luxury.
snowfall_street_mixed.prompt_fragment: lit by cold ambient night light and warm street practicals that catch the falling snow for a refined winter narrative

soft_toplight_overhead.name: Soft toplight overhead
soft_toplight_overhead.description: Large overhead soft source; premium catalog/editorial, consistent across poses, emphasizes drape without harsh face shadow.
soft_toplight_overhead.prompt_fragment: lit with a large soft overhead source for consistent exposure, clean drape visibility, and minimal harsh shadows

street_sodium_vapor.name: Street sodium vapor
street_sodium_vapor.description: Sodium-vapor streetlight look: warm amber cast, gritty realism, controlled for fashion readability.
street_sodium_vapor.prompt_fragment: lit by sodium-vapor streetlights with warm amber cast, controlled exposure, and realistic night atmosphere

studio_crosslight.name: Studio crosslight
studio_crosslight.description: Two opposing soft sources for even body illumination; great for full-body fit and texture proof.
studio_crosslight.prompt_fragment: lit with soft cross-lighting to evenly illuminate the full body and clearly reveal fit, seams, and texture

studio_edge_kicker.name: Studio edge kicker
studio_edge_kicker.description: Key plus subtle kicker edge light; premium shape definition without over-stylizing.
studio_edge_kicker.prompt_fragment: lit with a clean key plus subtle edge kicker to add premium shape definition while staying restrained

studio_high_key.name: Studio high key
studio_high_key.description: Bright, even studio lighting with minimal shadows
studio_high_key.prompt_fragment: lit with bright high-key studio lighting creating an even clean illumination

studio_low_key.name: Studio low key
studio_low_key.description: Dramatic studio lighting with deep shadows
studio_low_key.prompt_fragment: illuminated with dramatic low-key studio lighting and deep sculptural shadows

studio_three_point.name: Studio three point
studio_three_point.description: Classic key, fill, hair/back light; reliable commercial polish, clear separation, consistent for ads.
studio_three_point.prompt_fragment: lit with classic three-point studio lighting for controlled shadows, clean separation, and consistent commercial polish

tungsten_practical_warm.name: Tungsten practical warm
tungsten_practical_warm.description: Warm practical lamps as primary motivation; cozy interior feel, amber highlights, realistic falloff.
tungsten_practical_warm.prompt_fragment: lit primarily by warm practical tungsten sources with believable falloff and cozy amber highlights

window_side_key.name: Window side key
window_side_key.description: Single large window side key with soft falloff; intimate realism, gentle directional shadow, editorial calm.
window_side_key.prompt_fragment: illuminated by a large side window key for gentle directional shadows and intimate editorial realism
